violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream freezer has an accumulation of ice buildup. PIC will defrost ice buildup. PIC will send a picture to inspector once freezer is defrosted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of cabinets and mop-sink area were observed with an accumulation of old rodent droppings. Establishment to clean and sanitize these areas and monitor for activity. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
